Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Defaut Against Amjad Yousuf; To Strike Purported "Notice" Requesting Stay As A Sham Pleading, Or As Containin False, Improper, Or Irrelevant Matter; Or Not Having Been Drawn In Conformity With The Laws Of This State [Ccp 435, Et Seq], For Relief From Any "Automatic Stay", For Order Of Court Determining That Deft Has Waived Right To Arbitrate Attorney Fee Dispute Pursuant To Business & Professions Code Section 6201 (B)
Off Calendar Nov-30-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICES OF JON-MARK DOBRIN, APC'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT AGAINST AMJAD YOUSUF; TO STRIKE PURPORTED "NOTICE" REQUESTING STAY AS A SHAM PLEADING, OR AS CONTAINING FALSE, IMPROPER, OR IRRELEVANT MATTER; OR NOT HAVING BEEN DRAWN IN CONFORMITY WITH THE LAWS OF THIS STATE [CCP 435, ET SEQ], FOR RELIEF FROM ANY "AUTOMATIC STAY", FOR ORDER OF COURT DETERMINING THAT DEFENDANTT HAS WAIVED RIGHT TO ARBITRATE ATTORNEY FEE DISPUTE PURSUANT TO BUSINESS & PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 6201 (B).
APPEARANCES: HAL CHASE, ESQUIRE (DOBRIN LAW FIRM, 415.459.0307) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. BRENDAN BREWER, ESQUIRE (NO PHONE LISTED) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE FOLLOWING MOTIONS ARE DENIED: MOTION TO STRIKE, FOR RELIEF FROM STAY AND FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. DEFENDANT ONLY RECEIVED NOTICE OF THE RIGHT TO ARBITRATE, NOT UNDER THE MFAA. NOTICE MUST BE GIVEN OF THE THE RIGHT TO ARBITRATE UNDER THE MFAA BECAUSE IT IS A "SEPARATE AND DISTINCT ARBITRATION SCHEME." DEFENDANT HAS NOT WAIVED HIS RIGHTS UNDER THE MFAA. MR. BREWER TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM/MW-X) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
